'''âb-l-m-t''' ('''kabalmetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wail|wail]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-l-m-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wail|wail]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-l-m-t
|-
! Lemma
| kabalmetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibalmetoko|thibalmetoko]] || [[word:jibalmetoko|jibalmetoko]] || [[word:shibalmetoko|shibalmetoko]] || [[word:kibalmetoko|kibalmetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubalmetoko|thuthubalmetoko]] || [[word:jujubalmetoko|jujubalmetoko]] || [[word:shushubalmetoko|shushubalmetoko]] || [[word:kukubalmetoko|kukubalmetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubalmetoko|thubalmetoko]] || [[word:jubalmetoko|jubalmetoko]] || [[word:shubalmetoko|shubalmetoko]] || [[word:kubalmetoko|kubalmetoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobalmetoko|thothobalmetoko]] || [[word:jojobalmetoko|jojobalmetoko]] || [[word:shoshobalmetoko|shoshobalmetoko]] || [[word:kokobalmetoko|kokobalmetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobalmetoko|thobalmetoko]] || [[word:jobalmetoko|jobalmetoko]] || [[word:shobalmetoko|shobalmetoko]] || [[word:kobalmetoko|kobalmetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobalmetoko|thobalmetoko]] || [[word:jobalmetoko|jobalmetoko]] || [[word:shobalmetoko|shobalmetoko]] || [[word:kobalmetoko|kobalmetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚbalmetoko|thĂŚbalmetoko]] || [[word:jĂŚbalmetoko|jĂŚbalmetoko]] || [[word:shĂŚbalmetoko|shĂŚbalmetoko]] || [[word:kĂŚbalmetoko|kĂŚbalmetoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabalmetoko|thabalmetoko]] || [[word:jabalmetoko|jabalmetoko]] || [[word:shabalmetoko|shabalmetoko]] || [[word:kabalmetoko|kabalmetoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
